caption: Descriptor
description: OCI-like descriptor for module artifacts, including metadata and optional embedded payload.
name: descriptor

media_type.caption: Media Type
media_type.description: Media type for the artifact payload.

artifact_type.caption: Artifact Type
artifact_type.description: Optional media type identifying the artifact kind.

size.caption: Size
size.description: Size of the decoded artifact payload in bytes.

digest.caption: Digest
digest.description: Digest of the decoded artifact payload.

urls.caption: URLs
urls.description: Optional list of locations where the artifact can be downloaded from.

json.caption: JSON Data
json.description: Optional JSON payload for local tooling use.
